basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Postdoctoral Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website iitgn.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics with specialization in Condensed Matter Physics or Statistical Physics, Good academic record (minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th)
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics with specialization in Condensed Matter Physics or Statistical Physics. Good academic record with a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards. Minimum 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th. Candidates who have submitted their thesis are also eligible.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_gandhinag: Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics with specialization in Condensed Matter Physics or Statistical Physics, Good academic record (minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th)

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Gandhinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Vacancy 2026 Details
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics with specialization in Condensed Matter Physics or Statistical Physics. Good academic record with a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards. Minimum 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th. Candidates who have submitted their thesis are also eligible.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 26th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics with specialization in Condensed Matter Physics or Statistical Physics, along with a good academic record from graduation onwards and in 10th and 12th grades.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the Postdoctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 72,000/- to Rs. 84,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Postdoctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Postdoctoral Fellow position must be submitted online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Postdoctoral Fellow position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: IIT Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. Are candidates who have submitted their thesis eligible to apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have submitted their thesis are also eligible to apply for this Postdoctoral Fellow position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
